notification_banner.title: Notification Banner
notification_banner.subtitle: Paste a text here
notification_banner.description: The banner is going to be visible in the platform at the top portion of the screen, under the navigation bar.

map_settings.title: Map settings
map_settings.subtitle: Default map extent
map_settings.description: Select the area you want to show in the map when the user arrives to the platform

notification.title: Successful update
notification.message: The default view has been replaced

publish_notification.title: Success
publish_notification.message: New theme settings have been published

default_colors_notification.title: Brand colors saved
default_colors_notification.message: You can change them, experiment and come back to them anytime

restore_colors_notification.title: Brand colors restored.
restore_colors_notification.message: The brand colours have been reset to the default version

logo.title: Upload the logo for your platform
logo.label: Your picture will appear in the header
logo.supported_formats: Supported formats: jpg, png or svg.
logo.unsupported_format_error: Unsupported file format. Please upload a PNG, JPG or SVG file.

colors.title: Customize your colors
colors.message: Customize your brand colors for buttons, filter pills and backgrounds. You can set them as default, experiment freely, and return to them anytime.

primary-default.label: Background
primary-default.tooltip_text: This is how the button looks normally, when no one is interacting with it.

primary-hover.label: Background
primary-hover.tooltip_text: How it changes when you mouse over it.

secondary-default.label: Border
secondary-default.tooltip_text: This is how the button looks normally, when no one is interacting with it.

secondary-hover.label: Border
secondary-hover.tooltip_text: How it changes when you mouse over it.

tertiary-default.label: Text
tertiary-default.tooltip_text: This is how the button looks normally, when no one is interacting with it.

tertiary-hover.label: Text
tertiary-hover.tooltip_text: How it changes when you mouse over it.

list.empty_search_message: No datasets matching your search query
list.empty_message: No datasets yet. Click "Add dataset" to create one

delete_modal.title: Delete this dataset?
delete_modal.message: Are you sure you want to permanently delete {{datasetName}}? This action cannot be undone and the dataset will be removed from the list.

fields.name: Name
fields.author: Author
fields.author_helper: If you are not affiliated with any organization, you may enter “Independent Professional”.

soil_data.title: Add file/s
soil_data.template_docs_banner: Check the template documentation here on Github.
soil_data.upload_caption: Supported formats: CSV, Geopackage, GeoJSON, Shapefile, XLSX and ZIP.
soil_data.upload_error: Error uploading file. Check the template documentation in Github.
soil_data.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

diff_dialog.extra_fields: Extra fields not in the first file

mappings.file_inconsistency: This file has different fields with respect to the first uploaded file. Fix by matching all the fields and upload again.
mappings.title: Map fields
mappings.subtitle: Map your fields to standard concepts and units

banner.warning: Unmapped columns won't be loaded in the platform

mappings.geometry_detected: Geometry was automatically detected. You don't need to map the geometry or lat/lon fields.
mappings.geometry_not_detected: No geometry was detected. You must map the geometry field or both latitude and longitude fields to continue.
mappings.depth_conflict: The 'depth' field cannot be used together with 'min depth' or 'max depth'. Please remove one of these mappings to continue.

importing.title: Mapping fields
importing.description_1: This operation may take a few minutes to complete.
importing.description_2: Please keep the page open while we finish processing your request.

preview.title: Preview
preview.message: This is the data you are going to load, make sure everything is correct, you can unselect the rows that are not consistent, they won't be loaded in the dataset.

data_loading.title: Data loading started
data_loading.description: The system is loading your data, you can check the dataset status in the dataset table.

metadata_preview.title: Metadata preview
metadata_preview.description: The metadata will be shown to all users, even if the dataset is private. This will contribute to the discoverability of soil data.

public.title: Public dataset
public.description: All users can view and download the full dataset, subject to the license terms you specify

private.title: Private dataset
private.description: Only data administrators can view and download the full dataset, subject to the license terms you specify

access.title: Who can access this dataset
access.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
access.email_duplicate: This email has already been added

remove_dialog.title: Delete a data administrator
remove_dialog.message: Do you really want to delete this admin?

publish_warning.title: No T&C's and Privacy policy configured
publish_warning.heading: You are about to upload data to this instance
publish_warning.description: However, no platform-level rules are currently defined to govern user access, usage, or data handling. While a dataset licence may be in place, it does not cover these aspects.
publish_warning.warning_bold: We strongly recommend configuring Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy
publish_warning.warning_suffix: before proceeding, as their absence may create legal and compliance risks

leave_ingestion_modal.title: Leave this process?
leave_ingestion_modal.message: You can return later and continue editing from the datasets list.
leave_ingestion_modal.message_new_dataset: If you leave this process at this point, the progress won’t be saved.

intro.title: Why they need a separated configuration.
intro.description: Map-based filters require many GB of data to be added to the system. Each filter provides global coverage and it is provided in a separate package, to avoid unnecessary large downloads when installing the platform.

agroecological_zones.name: Agroecological zones
agroecological_zones.description: Agroecological Zones classify land according to its suitability for agricultural production by considering climatic conditions, land resources, and crop growth requirements.

land_cover.name: Land cover
land_cover.description: Land Cover categorizes the physical and biological cover present on the Earth’s surface, such as vegetation, cropland, water bodies, or built-up areas.

soil_groups.name: Soil groups
soil_groups.description: Soil groups classify soils into categories based on their physical, chemical, and morphological characteristics. These classifications provide a standardized way to describe and compare soils across different regions.

activation.title: Activate the filters
activation.description: Access our documentation and follow the instructions to activate the map-based filters:

error.title: Error
error.message: Failed to save metadata. Please try again.
